{{Quote|I'm not a Jedi because I like the hum of the lightsaber in my hand…and I'm not a Jedi because I like being a Jedi. I'm a Jedi because the galaxy needs Jedi.|Torr Snapit|<ref name="JvS 2" />}}
'''Torr Snapit''' was a [[Jedi scout]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] who lived during the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. He was killed on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

==Biography==
[[File:Torr_sacrifice.png|thumb|left|200px|Snapit sacrifices himself to save Hardin and Darovit.]]
Snapit disliked using his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and usually wielded a hardened wood staff, as it had a longer reach.

He discovered three young [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Humans]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Somov Rit]]—"[[Darovit|Tomcat]]," "[[Hardin|Bug]]," and "[[Darth Zannah/Legends|Rain]]." They were taken to [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], where the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] was battling the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]. While in transit, they were attacked by Sith [[Buzzard (starfighter)|fighters]], and narrowly escaped.

Once on land, the Sith were not far behind, and Torr held them back so that the children could escape. Slicing a rope bridge with his weapon once they were safely across, he fell down the canyon along with the hordes of Sith minions. Tomcat climbed down to try and retrieve Torr's lightsaber. Torr was still alive, and urged Tomcat to leave the weapon with him, but he could only watch in dismay as the boy took it anyway. Torr died from his injuries moments later.
